name: Swing 365 Golf Beatrice
address: 719 Market St Suite B, Beatrice, NE 68310
about: Swing 365 Golf Beatrice is a membership-based venue providing access to private, state-of-the-art golf simulators in a private club atmosphere. The facility features Full Swing™ simulator technology with 95+ available courses and 24/7 online booking capabilities. Membership includes unlimited simulator time, with various session lengths and pricing models depending on the specific location.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to premium Full Swing™ simulators with precise infrared ball tracking
365/24/7 online booking availability for maximum convenience
Private, climate-controlled suites for a focused and comfortable golf experience
Membership model provides unlimited play and consistent access

food_and_drink.notes: Members can bring their own food and beverages; catering options available for events
BYOB policy allows members to bring their own alcohol

simulator_hardware.notes: Features 688 infrared sensors across two tracks for high-speed ball flight measurement

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you will need to bring your own golf clubs to use the simulators.

faq.question: Can I bring food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, members can bring their own food and beverages (BYOB). The venue also allows catering for events.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: A typical 18-hole round on the simulator takes approximately 60-90 minutes depending on the pace of play and the number of players.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The venue does not specifically advertise as kid-friendly, but it can accommodate families and groups. Contact the venue directly for specific policies regarding children.
